title: Everything is a typed-object JSON block
context: Chris's core architecture doctrine — a message, a build plan, a task: all typed blocks, rendered if appropriate. Reference beats embed.

title: Honest ugly data > pretty fake data
context: The mantra. Never fudge numbers or hide failures to hit an estimate. An experiment that failed but told the truth is a win. Baked into the EXP template header.

title: Always branch, never commit to main directly
context: Chris pivot during duplicate-scene build (2026-07-19 ~07:30). PR per change.

title: Plans get a strength check + analytics gate
context: Chris pivot: plans must pass agent-burden / id-safety / no-stray-mutation check; novakai-analytics score must not drop below baseline.

title: HQ data = JSONL typed blocks; md for prose documents
context: Blocks for data (queryable, app-renderable, doctrine-native), md for documents (reports, EXPs, articles). Every document gets a block in an index pointing at it.

title: Full transparency publishing: LinkedIn (Chris) + dev.to
context: Full EXP logs published, repo public. Cadence: articles few times a week, LinkedIn daily (twitter-style). Volume via slicing one loaf, honesty as the brand.

title: Open-world refs: relation kinds emerge from use
context: No fixed menu of link types. Add a reference with any kind string (sessionId, designId, …); used kinds become relations; we watch what emerges over time.
